title: 3 Monday Mistakes Killing Your Funded Account (ICT Trading 2026)
description: Monday trading is a trap — and most traders fall for it every single week. Here are the 3 biggest Monday mistakes ICT traders make, and how the R2F Trading system avoids them. Smart money sets the weekly high or low on Monday. Are you on the right side? Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups, order block analysis, and funded trader coaching.
script: Stop. Before you place a single trade today — 83% of funded accounts get blown on Mondays. Here's exactly why. Mistake one. You're trading Friday's range like it still matters. It doesn't. Smart money sweeps it first thing Monday. That sweep? It's a false break. London open is building the weekly narrative — not giving you an entry. Wait for structure. Mistake two. Ignoring the order block left behind after that sweep. That's where smart money reloads. That's your entry. Mistake three. No fair value gap confirmation. Price doesn't just reverse — it fills the FVG first. Every. Single. Time. The R2F Trading system calls this the Monday sequence — sweep, order block, FVG fill. Three confirmations before touching the button. I blew three accounts before learning this. Monday isn't a trading day — it's a reading day. Read smart money. Then act. Follow R2F Trading. We post real ICT setups every single day. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
